meaning: n.(保护动物不遭捕猎等的)"绿色和平"组织
examples: The government yesterday accused Greenpeace of scaremongering.
All the Greenpeace people behaved with impressive forbearance and dignity.
Greenpeace managed to assemble a small flotilla of inflatable boats to waylay the ship at sea.
Once employed by Greenpeace, she's has spent the last 10 years working out of Gloucester, Mass.
Bayer failed to strike a juror in the previous MDL trial who was a Greenpeace contributor.
